svg.title: Kannika system — physical deployment diagram
svg.desc: Three-region physical architecture: East, West, and RTOP regions each containing Kannika service and Kafka MRC cluster nodes, with S3 storage in East and RTOP, a central Event Gateway and Armory Console in West, Splunk for observability, and NGINX ingress spanning all regions.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How is Kafka MRC East deployed?')
sendPrompt('Where is S3 East bucket located?')
sendPrompt('How is Kafka MRC West deployed?')
sendPrompt('How is Kafka MRC RTOP deployed?')
sendPrompt('Where is S3 RTOP bucket located?')
sendPrompt('Where is Splunk hosted and what does it monitor?')
sendPrompt('How does NGINX ingress span all regions?')
